decision.value: Keep session IDs in Redis for 24 hours
decision.evidence: keep session ids in Redis for 24 hours

tradeoff.value: Redis is added to the authentication path for immediate revocation
tradeoff.evidence: It adds Redis to the auth path, but revocation is immediate.

alternative.evidence: JWT-only sessions cannot be revoked quickly enough.

open_question.value: Whether enterprise SSO should get a shorter TTL
open_question.evidence: Should enterprise SSO get a shorter TTL
